item.title: Test-log addendum 071-2?
item.content:encoded:
On ██/██/██ Dr. █████████ selected four D-class personnel who have all self-identified as asexual since early adulthood. One of these subjects (a female survivor of [DATA EXPUNGED]) was asked to describe SCP-071's current form, and complied: "It's some kind of clearish, colorless oval blob….no obvious features or body parts…it smells like unwashed sheets, and it keeps shrinking in on itself, making this squelching noise….turn me on? Oh jeez, no…quite the opposite, Doctor, this thing scares the [REDACTED] out of me. Could I please get one of those pills ans go back to quarters?"

The remaining D-class asexuals described a similar amorphous, translucent, and foul-smelling entity; as with D- █████████, all reported that SCP-071 shrank away from them, as if in pain.

item.title: SCP-071 vs. sex-repulsed asexuals
item.content:encoded: Weird idea: what if sex-repulsed aces forced SCP-071 into its actual base form and made it extremely uncomfortable? If 071 "feeds" on lust, it would logically be "poisoned" by anti-sexual thoughts and feelings; if the nearest viewer had no ideal mate or fetish to copy, 071 would be too confused to keep any shape but its natural one.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I think its incredibly neat that they brought in the concept of dubious sentience

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
''SCP-071 came to the Foundation's attention on ██/██/██ following [DATA EXPUNGED]. ''

When you are tired and can't think of any details for the scp

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It might turn into the person's strongest romantic desire, since that's the next tier of attraction.

If the person was aroace, 071 would probably turn into something that they really want to cuddle (stuffed animal, puppy, best friend, etc.)

I'm just guessing here. It would be a good idea to put an asexual instance in the article, though.

item.title: Admin Post - Info - Open
item.content:encoded: Alexus-0, while it's great that you seem to be endeavoring to comment on every SCP article you read, it might be good to slow down a bit with your posting so you can use proper grammar and capitalization. People will be more likely to respond to a comment that looks thoughtfully-written rather than rushed out in a hurry, and also it'll be less likely to be interpreted as spam.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is awesome as it stands, i just feel theres room for an awesome tale here. something similar to project 'Pandora's Box' but with more of a spying and assassination angle, at least maybe some addendum or a report showing attempts to control it for use in the field. it just feels too useful for the foundation to be ignoring it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: [REDACTED}

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: Wait… what is preventing the Foundation from trying this? Unless you end up with an Scp-682 mate and then you have two of them.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: *golf clap*

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Good enough to not downvote, I guess, but it certainly could do something more than rectify the myth of the succubus. If the Foundation learned anything new, good or bad, about this, maybe it would be an upvote.

As it stands, I prefer much more SCP-031.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What if it was exposed to an asexual person. Someone who has no sexual desires at all? Would it react as if it were unobserved or still try to seduce them ?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A bit of necro, but the delay is so it doesn't change into what the people looking at it wants.
Doesn't stop the effect of masturbating to it, just the change into the viewer's fetish.

Subjects who achieve auto-gratification through masturbation via the use of media containing SCP-071 (whether delayed or not) suffer the same effects.

So a photo or video that's already the fetish of the viewer, would still carry the effect.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: yes, i'm pretty sure people get it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Sorry, I had to upvote it. It was +173 before.

Ehh?

Eeehh?

EEeeehhh?

EEEEEHHHHHH?

(geddit?)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Find someone with a fetish for the sun

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Upvoted, but I had one lingering question.

Why bother removing images of it from the internet? If a time delay on a live feed is enough to cancel out the effect, then why would a video or picture on the internet trigger it, since such things would technically be on a much longer time delay then the live feed used to observe it? (Also, it would quite nicely explain the "sex tapes" and pictures of celebrities that pop up online from time to time that they deny are them….a good portion of them are simply 071 "fulfilling someones fantasy".)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
One thing I'd point out is that "asexual" does not mean "Is incapable of enjoying sexual activity or self-stimulation". It just means that they don't have strong physical attractions to others as a general rule.

Is this usage clinical in psychology now?

I suggest we might want to avoid it in our usage in SCP articles because of the confusion with the biological meaning.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
One thing I'd point out is that "asexual" does not mean "Is incapable of enjoying sexual activity or self-stimulation". It just means that they don't have strong physical attractions to others as a general rule. Anecdotally, I've heard some self-identified asexuals claim to have fetishes that engage them on a more abstract level, and others that find simple intimacy itself satisfying. People are complicated like that.

So in their case, it may play a role more like a Geisha, engaging them intellectually and emotionally, or play off of their abstract desires- power fantasies, paraphilias, etc.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What if an animal is shown to the SCP? Does it attract the animal?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I've liked this article for years but apparently forgot to upvote until now. +1

Also, I wonder what would happen if it was exposed to a sex-repulsed ace person?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Grape jello ahhh hahahaha

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Bit of a necro (months don't make a year, but still, sorry for that.)

asexual

This.

pre-pubescent

I'd wager the item would struggle, but eventually find something to crack its puberty open ahead of time.

As for the article, it grew in exactly the same way I expected it to, and arrived to the obvious conclusion. Short and well-written, though; this is good enough to warrant an upvote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Wonder what would happen if you cross-tested this with other SCPs.

SCP-076-2 - SCP-071 turns into a male Foundation researcher wearing a shirt that says "PLEASE KILL THE FUCK OUT OF ME".
SCP-2337 - SCP-071 turns into Margaret Thatcher riding a unicycle and passing out gummy worms.
SCP-999 - SCP-071 turns into grape jello.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I came here just to ask the above question as well… I'd like to see what happens in the presence of an asexual. Does it just disappear? (that's not a terrible idea… and one of the other similar SCPs acknowledged what would happen in the presence of an aromantic person, so it's feasible.)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What happens if a subject is asexual or pre-pubescent?

item.title: Mod Post - Closed
item.content:encoded:
Regardless of whether or not it's true, this comment didn't need to be made. Mr Childs, in the future please try to refrain from this kind of immature expression.

Do not respond to this post if you are not staff.

item.title: C'mon D-7883
item.content:encoded: Comment Removed -djkaktus

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'd be a bit embarrassed about confronting this. My tastes are kind of weird, though compared to dog, I guess I'm more normal after all.

Not really feeling this, but there's nothing about it that would warrant a downvote or neutral vote. It's just not my thing I guess!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ehhh I honestly got nothing from this other than the whole wish fulfillment BUT WITH A TERRIBLE TERRIBLE TWIST cliché.

-1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
upvoted. though one thought comes to mind after reading this line:

efforts to remove all visual recordings of SCP-071 from the Internet are ongoing.

are they basically getting loads of D-Class to look at porn all day, every day for a month taking part in "auto-gratification" :S

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I feel like this is basically SCP form of how Mom always used to tell you that if you'd masturbate you'd go blind or deaf or something.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My mind tends to look at the tests not performed and questions unanswered:

  • The closed circuit video has a 60 second delay, but how much delay is actually sufficient? Technically, all indirect (or direct) observation operates at some tiny level of delay.
  • Do other media depictions work? Audio recordings, paintings, sculpture, etc.
  • If so, does the depiction need to be accurate, or even directly representational? That is to say-Would an abstract painting intended to evoke the feeling and idea of SCP-071 be enough?
  • Where exactly is the line between masturbating to SCP-071 and to the memory of SCP-071? For example, subject sees SCP-071 turn into the object of their desire. If the subject later masturbates to an image of said object, would this effect attach?
  • Between D-class personel and many researchers with functional mental illnesses, the Foundation has access to a WIDE array of paraphilias. How does SCP-071 react to fetishes regarding abstract concepts or principles?
  • What would happen during the shift of form between a test on a necrophiliac and a test on a subject conditioned to lust after SCP-447-1?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
So, based on what I read earlier here, SCP-071 won't change form when another person sees it, while the person who's already there remains there?

And when multiple people first see it, does it change into the first person that saw it… no, doesn't work like that, it changes even when people aren't looking at it. But what causes it to choose any one form over the other when presented with multiple subjects?

item.title: SCP-071
item.content:encoded:
Upvoted because,

efforts to remove all visual recordings of SCP-071 from the Internet are ongoing.

porn of it is still online and anyone who gets off to it is likely to "suffer permanent decrease in stature, decreased organ function, decreased brain mass and sterility" and now I am terrified to look at nudie pics.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It apparently has not been mentioned yet but, has it been tested with asexual and or neutered individuals?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: …Holy crap, you're right. I'd completely forgotten about that short story.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It looks like someone SCPfied the tale "How's the night life on Cissalda".

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: It doesn't come close to passing the "No Really" test. It's a funny joke, but that's it.

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: You're right. I wonder if this can be made "un-retarded" and into an actually interesting article.

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: No, because that would be retarded.

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded:
I volunteer a fictional me to be the one who has to remember, lol.

Also, why isn't this on the "Attempts to decommission 682" page?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: [DATA EXPUNGED], that's what.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What if someone has an extreme fetish for 682 on Iris?

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: You know at least one of the D-Class personnel are gonna are gonna react to that with a "Hell, YES!". Which would make me wonder if they would get the damaging effects of SCP-071 for [REDACTED] to that ungodly sight. Hmm, this looks like a job… for SCIENCE!

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: I like you Voct, if only because this was the first place my mind went when reading the page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
All porn is an affirmation of life, even and especially the kind that causes you to die.

……… Just cause it hasn't been said in a while.
Are we cool yet?

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: And again I say, one of the ruined, huddled masses must be chosen, must be forced to be strong enough not to take amnesiacs. To continue on, to force themselves to live, knowing that their sacrifice is due to the fact that those who forget SCP-682 fucking are doomed to repeat SCP-682 fucking.

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: I think reading this gave me herpes.

item.title: Re: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded: I want to upvote this comment so hard.

item.title: because it's too amusing to let it disappear with the previous talk page
item.content:encoded:
Termination test for SCP-682 using SCP-071:

682 introduced to 071's containment.

[DATA EXPUNGED]

[DATA EXPUNGED]

[OH GOD, DATA EXPUNGED]

SCP-682 returned to its own containment; class-A amnesiacs administered to everyone onsite.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I didn't find this appealing in the least, to be honest. The addendum was a little amusing, but that's about it. It felt like "I want an SCP that can be something I can fap to," but given that it's a rewrite… well, I just can't imagine what this was like originally.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I preferred the sheep to the retriever (because it reminds me of that joke "Do they call me John the Bridger Builder? No. But you shag one sheep…") but otherwise a solid rewrite.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Not bad.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This. When I wrote the logs I had the idea of a lot of D-Class having "DD Pornstar" tastes; the kind of stuff that would get pinned up on the cell walls of normal prisons. But having 15 entries essentially consisting of "DD Pornstar" does not good writing make.

Also upvoted.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Oh man, I totally missed that, I'm satiated now.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yeah, if only there was something in the addenda about turning into a golden retriever or something it'd be perfect…

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I miss the bestiality, now it's necrophilia and paedophilia.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I like the mythological connotations combined with competent writing enough to upvote.

I actually wouldn't have minded even more mythological crap in there, depending on execution.
